intro.title: Your Hidden Network
intro.subhead: You know more people than you think. Let's make your network visible.
intro.outcome: You will see your network as a map, plus a ready-to-send message to reconnect.

page.network_why: List anyone who comes to mind. No name is too small — a quick "who they are" is fine.
page.readiness_why: Be honest about how this feels. There are no wrong answers.

categories.coworkers_why: Anyone from a job, here or overseas.
categories.friends_why: People you see around or keep in touch with.
categories.community_why: Anyone from school, classes, or groups you belong to.

contact.name_label: Their name or who they are
contact.name_ph: e.g., Auntie Lin, or my old manager
contact.how_ph: e.g., works in healthcare, knows many people

readiness.q1: I feel okay asking people I know for help.
readiness.q2: I know what I would ask for — advice, a referral, an introduction.
readiness.q3: I can send a short message to reconnect with someone.
readiness.q4: I believe the people I know would be glad to help me.

building.name: Warming up
building.desc: Reaching out feels big right now — that's normal. Start with one person you trust most.

getting_ready.name: Getting comfortable
getting_ready.desc: You're close. Practice your message on someone easy first, then send a few more.

ready.name: Ready to reach out
ready.desc: You're ready. Use the message below to reconnect with someone today.

outreach.line1: Hi {name}, it's been a while — I hope you're doing well!
outreach.line2: I'm exploring some new work opportunities, and I'd really value your advice.
outreach.line3: Could we chat for 15 minutes sometime this week? Thank you so much!

results.title: Your Network
results.narrative_h: Here's what we heard about you
results.narrative_body: Most people know far more helpful people than they realize. Here is your network — and a simple way to reach out.
results.map_lead: Your network, grouped. Each person is a door that might open.
results.map_empty: Add a few people above — start with family and friends.
results.meter_h: How ready you feel to reach out
results.meter_lead: Asking for help is a skill, not a weakness.
results.script_lead: A friendly way to reconnect. Change the words to sound like you.
results.cta_body: Take your network map and message to the Networking workshop to practice reaching out.
